evacuationRoutes.description: Exit via stairwell N1 straight to Marine Drive side Gate A
Exit via Garware ground floor to 'D' Road Gate B
Exit via East staircases to ground level and Gate C (Churchgate side)
Exit via West grandstand to upper levels and Gate D
